headline: BNY Mellon to Launch Bitcoin and Ethereum Crypto Custody in UAE
summary: Wall Street giant BNY Mellon (now BNY) will offer crypto asset custody in Abu Dhabi, the UAE, the global financial services company announced on Thursday. It will initially launch Bitcoin and Ethereum crypto custody services, with plans of expanding to stablecoins, tokenized real-world assets, and other regulated digital instruments. Ad Ad BNY Mellon Expands Crypto

headline: BNY Partners With Finstreet And ADI Foundation To Deliver Regulated Institutional-Grade Digital Asset Custody In Abu Dhabi Global Market
summary: The companies will work together to offer regulated, scalable, institutional-grade digital asset custody to UAE clients.The strategic collaboration advances Abu Dhabi's position as a global hub for regulated digital
